metadata.scriptContent: npx expo export --platform ios && npx source-map-explorer dist/_expo/static/js/ios/*.js --html bundle-report.html
npx expo export --platform android && npx source-map-explorer dist/_expo/static/js/android/*.js --html bundle-report-android.html
npx expo export --platform ios && echo '=== Bundle sizes ===' && du -sh dist/_expo/static/js/ios/* && echo '=== Total ===' && du -sh dist/
